chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 835 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.3691/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 24.06.2025 Mr. Muhammad Iqbal Memon, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General along with Inspector Mir Hashmat on behalf of Respondents No.3 & 4 and Inspector Nisar Ahmed Mughal Incharge SSOIU (City) Nawab Shah. >>>>>..<<<<< Statements have been filed by respondents No.3 and 4, which are taken on record. Learned counsel for the petitioners under instructions does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
